title: PBB Otso
description: Sheena Catacutan first appeared on national television as a housemate of Pinoy Big Brother: Otso. This marked the beginning of her journey in the entertainment industry.
achievements: Introduced to millions of Filipino viewers

timeline.title: Entered PBB Otso
timeline.description: Sheena officially entered the Pinoy Big Brother house and introduced herself to the nation.

timeline.title: Weekly Challenges
timeline.description: Participated in house tasks that showcased her determination and cheerful personality.

timeline.title: Entertainment Journey Begins
timeline.description: Her television exposure became the stepping stone toward becoming an idol.

gallery.alt: Sheena during her PBB Otso era

title: Star Hunt Academy
description: After PBB, Sheena entered Star Hunt Academy where she trained extensively in singing, dancing, and performing before debuting as a member of BINI.
achievements: Became one of the final eight trainees

timeline.title: Joined Star Hunt Academy
timeline.description: Began intensive idol training under ABS-CBN's Star Hunt Academy.

timeline.title: Developed Her Skills
timeline.description: Spent months improving her vocals, dance, stage presence, and teamwork.

timeline.title: Chosen as BINI Member
timeline.description: Graduated as one of the final eight trainees who would debut as BINI.

gallery.alt: Sheena during her Star Hunt Academy training era

title: Da Coconut Nut
description: BINI officially introduced themselves through their pre-debut remake of Ryan Cayabyab's Da Coconut Nut.

timeline.title: Pre-debut Reveal
timeline.description: BINI was officially introduced to the public.

timeline.title: Released Da Coconut Nut
timeline.description: The remake became the group's first official release.

timeline.title: Preparing for Debut
timeline.description: The members continued training while promoting the pre-debut single.

gallery.alt: Sheena during BINI's Da Coconut Nut pre-debut era

title: Born To Win
description: BINI officially debuted with Born To Win, beginning their professional career as the Nation's Girl Group.

timeline.title: Official Debut
timeline.description: Released Born To Win on June 4, 2021.

timeline.title: First Album
timeline.description: Released the Born To Win album featuring multiple tracks.

timeline.title: Growing Fanbase
timeline.description: Started building a dedicated Bloom fandom.

gallery.alt: Sheena during BINI's Born To Win era

title: Feel Good
description: The Feel Good era established BINI's signature bright and youthful sound through songs that became fan favorites.

timeline.title: Feel Good Album
timeline.description: Released their sophomore album.

timeline.title: Lagi Became a Favorite
timeline.description: Lagi quickly became one of BINI's most loved songs.

timeline.title: More Live Performances
timeline.description: The group appeared in more festivals, TV shows, and concerts.

gallery.alt: Sheena during BINI's Feel Good era

title: Pantropiko
description: Pantropiko became a nationwide phenomenon followed by Talaarawan, launching BINI into mainstream success.

timeline.title: Karera Released
timeline.description: The inspirational single became a fan favorite.

timeline.title: Pantropiko Went Viral
timeline.description: Pantropiko dominated TikTok and became a nationwide summer anthem.

timeline.title: Talaarawan EP
timeline.description: Released Salamin, Salamin and reached new career heights.

timeline.title: Cherry On Top
timeline.description: Continued the group's international momentum.

gallery.alt: Sheena during BINI's Pantropiko and Talaarawan era

title: BINIverse World Tour
description: BINI embarked on their first major international tour, expanding their global reach and preparing for even larger stages.
songs: Cherry On Top - BiniMo Remix (BINIverse Album)

timeline.title: World Tour Begins
timeline.description: Performed in multiple international cities.

timeline.title: Sold-Out Shows
timeline.description: Connected with Blooms around the world.

timeline.title: Global Recognition
timeline.description: Prepared the group for even larger international festivals like Coachella.

timeline.title: First Luv Released
timeline.description: Released the single "First Luv," which is part of the FLAMES album.

timeline.title: Sweet Tooth Released
timeline.description: Released the single "Sweet Tooth," which is part of the FLAMES album.

gallery.alt: Sheena during the BINIverse World Tour era

title: Coachella Era
description: BINI made history as the first Filipino act to perform at Coachella, bringing P-pop to one of the world's biggest music festivals.

timeline.title: Coachella Announcement
timeline.description: The world learned BINI would perform at Coachella.

timeline.title: Historic Performance
timeline.description: As BINI made history as the first Filipino act to perform at the festival, Sheena stood out with her powerful stage presence and exceptional dancing, earning praise and attracting new fans from around the world.

timeline.title: Billboard: Global Force Award
timeline.description: Recognized for their global impact and influence.

timeline.title: Grammy Museum: Global Spin Live
timeline.description: The Nation's Girl Group BINI continued to introduce themselves to the world with a special guest appearance at the Grammy Museum.

timeline.title: Summer Sonic Japan Announcement
timeline.description: BINI will perform on the Mountain Stage at Summer Sonic 2026 on August 14 in Osaka and August 16 in Tokyo.

timeline.title: Worldwide Recognition
timeline.description: Media around the world highlighted the group's historic achievement.

gallery.alt: Sheena during BINI's historic Coachella era

title: Signals Era
description: The Signals era represents BINI's continued global expansion through their fourth EP, Summer Sonic, and worldwide promotions.

timeline.title: Unang Kilig Released
timeline.description: Sheena choreographed the chorus of "Unang Kilig."

timeline.title: Signals
timeline.description: BINI entered the Signals era with a new collection of songs and global promotions.

timeline.title: Signals World Tour
timeline.description: Embarked on a world tour connected to the Signals era.

timeline.title: DreamWorks' Forgotten Island
timeline.description: BINI was chosen to perform the official soundtrack for DreamWorks' animated adventure.

timeline.title: Summer Sonic Japan
timeline.description: BINI is set to appear at one of Asia's major music festivals.

timeline.title: Global Promotions
timeline.description: Continued expanding BINI's presence worldwide.
